ingest_scope: Record-only ingestion of the Claude Code 2 independent P05 witness receipt. No commissioning rerun. No reinterpretation of missing or failing evidence.

embedded_verbatim.deployed_schema_binding: migration checksums 001=be6a0865.. 002=d5128833.. match origin/main byte-for-byte (binds SCHEMA, not service code)

cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.kernel_tree_continuity: git diff fa2e2e0..43c754f -- packages/runway-graph-kernel/ is EMPTY: the witnessed kernel tree is byte-identical on current main; witness verdict applies to current main's kernel. VERIFIED
cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.proof_manifest_hash: REPRODUCED EXACTLY: sha256 over sorted '<sha256>  <repo-relative-path>' lines of the 16 proof files at 060c522 = 8e37b944...b124. VERIFIED
cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.deployed_sha_unverifiable: CONFIRMED: /healthz exposes no commit SHA; witness honestly recorded UNVERIFIABLE rather than inferring. Migration checksums in live /healthz (001=be6a0865..., 002=d5128833...) match witness record and origin/main. VERIFIED
cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.witness_hygiene_note: Witness is read-only, author != subject (builder of #154 was the Cursor lane 'kazemnezhadsina144-dot'), records UNVERIFIABLE where evidence is missing, and grades tests below PASS (PASS_WEAK/PASS_SCOPED/INDETERMINATE) rather than rounding up.

recorded_fields.deployed_staging_sha: UNVERIFIABLE_no_commit_in_healthz (schema bound via migration checksums only; service-code SHA unbound)
recorded_fields.remaining_nonblocking_findings: NOT_APPLICABLE — verdict is FAIL_P05; the 4 FAIL results (02, 05, 06, 09) and 1 INDETERMINATE (04) are BLOCKING findings, not nonblocking. No nonblocking-findings list exists to record.

separated_verdicts.builder_verdict: PASS_P05 — P07_VERDICT.json at proof-producing commit a3578d9 (PR #154, merged 060c522), audited_at 2026-07-22T12:53:11.842Z, claims tests 01-09 all PASS, remaining_blockers []. Author = builder lane (author == subject); under NOOS law this is a SUBMITTED claim, not a governing verdict.
separated_verdicts.independent_witness_verdict: FAIL_P05 — Claude Code 2 read-only witness, observation start 13:14:04Z, tally 3 PASS / 1 PASS_WEAK / 1 PASS_SCOPED / 1 INDETERMINATE / 4 FAIL. GOVERNS THE GATE (author != subject).
separated_verdicts.live_service_health: LIVE/HEALTHY at ingest (14:0xZ probes): staging /healthz 200 ok:true worker gk-staging-68340357, migrations 001+002 checksummed, hmac_configured, cf_queue_configured, loops:true; CF consumer HTTP 200. Liveness is NOT commissioning proof.
separated_verdicts.evidence_health: CONFLICTED: builder claims 9/9 PASS on the same proof set the independent witness grades 4x FAIL. Exact-head CI verify on current main 43c754f is now GREEN (PR #153 pg-shim fix) — the prior S0 TS-gate blocker is cleared, but the builder-vs-witness proof conflict is open and unresolved.

gate_decision.rule: Founder directive: open only if independent verdict is PASS_P05_CONFIRMED or PASS_P05_WITH_NONBLOCKING_FINDINGS.
gate_decision.decision: FAIL_P05 is not in the permitted set. Gate stays closed. Missing/failed evidence is NOT reinterpreted as PASS.

machine_route: Builder-vs-witness conflict on tests 02/04/05/06/09 routes to the Runway builder lane for remediation with fresh independently witnessable evidence; re-witness after remediation. Not a founder decision until machine retries are exhausted.
